markdownRemark.html:
Notes

Here is where I compile all of the notes I take for every conceivable thing in my life. I'm a huge fan of organization and simplification, so that's my ultimate goal in compiling all of this knowledge.

Components

  • Money Umbrella - Everything related to making money and business
  • Christ and the church - Everything related to the enjoyment of Christ and the church practically
  • Learning & Building - Various notes on things I'm actually improving in and creating stuff in

Knowledge Stuff to Simplify

  • What is an API? (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s7wmiS2mSXY)
  • How does the Internet and webpages work?
  • How do software applications actually work? (frontend and backend)
  • Dynamic and asynchronous JavaScript and how web requests and http and all the mumbo jumbo
  • Guide for music recording and editing (vocal mixing) -> different effects like compressor, delay, reverb
  • What is context switching?

List of Topics to Simplify

  • Musing on why young people leave the church life (66% of Christians aged 22-30 left)

    • 4 reasons: weren't trained to handle the transitions, hypocrisy (especially in parents0, judgement, didn't have real intergenerational relationships (didn't feel the family life)
    • People who are solid in the church life tend to have around 5 meaningful intergenerational relationships (besides parents and serving ones)

  • What causes people to leave the Lord and the church (given that there is a desire within all of us to be with the saints)

    • Categories: offenses, hidden rocks, accusations from the enemy, lack of care or outreach, lack of feeling (turning to the world)
    • Learning how to experience the Lord as the Man of sorrows (burdens everywhere -> blessed are those who mourn)
    • Lessons on caring (continued shepherding) from time with Mike Wong
    • When you bring someone to the Lord, you can't leave him/her alone. It's too dangerous. The enemy will come in to attack right away. They need to be IMMEDIATELY plugged into the church life in a strong way.
    • I truly am the mdoern incarnation of Jeremiah
    • Track the significance of households in the Bible
    • Stories of Kenny and Susan clearly show what is NOT useful to the Lord (natural zeal and/or outward spirituality)
    • The church life primarily in the homes (the reality of the church life) -> sisters' function
    • The household is the real unit for the church life and for serving the Lord
    • Musing on the 3 chapters in both old and new testaments that God finally had what he wanted, and how man fell from it (looseness regarding marriage and hypocrisy)
    • Musing on what a friend or companion really is and why I'm happy despite having a small circle of "friends"
    • Important principle of exponential returns -> lots of time is spent figuring things out and getting things prepared, and people only see the output but they don't see the time put in before hand
